---
description: "Use when editing the A-tim page content or layout in pages/atim.html."
applyTo: "pages/atim.html"
---

# A-Tim Page Guidelines

- Treat this page as a mostly static content page.
- Keep shared `session.js`, `header.js`, and `footer.js` integration intact.
- If you add dynamic behavior, follow the existing `window.OSKSession` API-base pattern used elsewhere instead of introducing a new environment convention.
